description: Deterministic lint: crypto/web3 jargon in visitor-facing UI copy. Offloads the mechanical blocklist scan from the LLM review.not-crypto-scary so the model can focus on qualitative 'crypto-scary' judgment. Un-excused hits default to uncertain (triage: fix copy or add an allow-list rule); flip failOnHit once the allow-list is seeded. No model calls.
